title: [codereview-pass1.5 robustness] rf_health.rs: EMA fixed-point can overflow on extreme values; add saturating_add
description: For rssi_fp = i16::MIN << 16 could underflow i32. Although practical range is limited, use saturating arithmetic for robustness in rf_health. file: rust/lichen-core/src/rf_health.rs:147
